tool_args.label: System Overall OTP Below Annual Goal 2022

payload.claim_text: System Overall on-time performance for 2022 was 94.0%, below the annual goal of 96.3%
Total system delay minutes increased from 8,028 in 2021 to 9,490 in 2022, an increase of 1,462 minutes
Percent of Scheduled Trips Completed was 99.6% for 2022, slightly up from 99.5% in 2021
